reviews.review_msg: Dr Reimer was an excellent professor. He is very passionate about what he teaches and does really care about his students and plans workloads accordingly. While he is slightly disorganized and forgets to upload discussion posts, the workload is very manageable if you don't procrastinate. If youre looking for an interesting Arc course, I reccomend!

Rudy is an amazing person, but he is also extremely chaotic and disorganized. He cancels lectures, forgets to put in all the assignments to canvas (like midterms), and as a result, you are missing the grade. However, he is very caring as well. With a good TA it all might work, but his lectures still need more structure.

Rudy, his lectures and the content and course work are great, but he cancels class often, sometimes less than an hour before class. He sometimes neglects to add marks into canvas, so your grade ends up lower because your assignments may be 'missing' (this is bad when there are only 3 assignments) and he is IMPOSSIBLE to get ahold of.

Wow, what can I say. I absolutely loved every lecture and spending time with Rudy. He is so inspirational and caring. He gives great feedback and is very lenient and knows us students are stressed and work hard, so he gives us plenty of time to complete assignments. Field trips too. Easily a gem at SFU. Best INDG prof hands down. Rudy is awesome!!
Great professor! I have had Rudy for Ethnozoology and Indigenous Perceptions of Landscape. Interesting lectures, would recommend any courses he teaches!

There was a LOT reading. Probably could have got away with not doing some of it, but the assigned papers were relevant. Lecture was a bit disorganized, but interesting overall. Tutorial got cancelled a lot, which wasn't anyone's fault but it was frustrating. I'd recommend to anyone interested in archaeology or in Indigenous history.

One of my absolute favourite professors in the Archaeology program. He cares about local archaeology and introduces his class to some of the current field work. He provides large amounts of interesting First Nations background information. Always willing to talk during after class or during office hours, 100% would take again.

Dr. Rudy is a great guy and lectures are really informative and interesting. It's too bad the class wasn't better organized, communication was lacking and expectations for assignments weren't at all clear (even before the class moved online). The midterm questions were so confusing. Do your readings and know the content really well for exams.

Great Instructor. Really tries to engage with students and makes class more fun with mini field trips around campus and such. Always loves to throw in a joke or two especially when he could tell we were stressed out with other classes

Rudy is one of the absolute best lecturers I've ever had. He's so engaging and so passionate about this course content. If you need to take arch273 take it with Rudy! The exams and paper are pretty straightforward and the grading is very fair

RUDY IS AWESOME!!!! he is so nice and his course material is interesting and very organized. he puts a lot of effort into his lectures and material. this is a prof who genuinely cares and makes school worthwhile

Rudy is an exceptional prof and a super nice person. Definitely the most approachable and kind professor at SFU. Always willing to help. Peppers lectures with humour and fun facts and stories of the cool things he's done. 10/10.
LOVE HIM, best prof I've had my whole university career!!

I liked this class, but Rudy doesn't provide feedback. Only approachable in class and good luck getting a hold of him otherwise. We were left clueless as to what he expected of us. We didn't get ANY assignment grades back period. We only saw our course grade posted on Go SFU and oddly everyone I talked to received the same grade...

I loved this course and didn't miss one lecture. Very engaging prof that is telling you a story as he teaches, not just reading slides out to you. I found it a little difficult to keep the material organized, as it jumped from past to present within different cultural groups, but overall I highly recommend this prof and class to everyone.
He is a very good prof.

He's so bad at explaining what he wants. I took this for the CRM certificate... you should probably try another class. This whole course is designed around making up a research project but he doesn't really tell you that? And you still need to submit a final paper on a project you designed to be fake...

This prof is not clear as to what he is expecting when assigning things. He is very disorganized, and is not helpful outside of class time. He marks super slow and tough, and needs to be reminded to explain assignments.
Very good prof. Very helpful.. Go to class and take notes.
Was very helpful and willing to talk to students about material. You can tell his interest in the course content is high! Would recommend this class with Rudy!
